issues.title: 7 consecutive encounters with HP > 90% (floors 1-3)
issues.description: 7 encounters in a row where player HP remained above 72 (90% of 80 max): F1E0, F1E1, F1E2, F2E0, F2E1, F2E2, F3E0. HP values: 80, 80, 80, 80, 80, 77, 77. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
reproductionSteps: Encounters: F1E0, F1E1, F1E2, F2E0, F2E1, F2E2, F3E0

issues.description: Player HP went from 62 (>56) to 14 (<16) within a single encounter on floor 9. This dramatic HP swing can feel unfair and unfun.
